final:
module register_8bit (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire enable,
    input wire [7:0] d,
    output reg [7:0] q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 8'b0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule
